name: gtir
description: Find code and notes by meaning — a local, hybrid semantic-search CLI + MCP server (vector + BM25 + tree-sitter, via Ollama; no cloud, no API keys).
author: WooFL

scripts.eval: node bin/gtir.mjs eval --repo eval/corpus --golden eval/golden.json --baseline eval/baseline.json
scripts.eval:edges: node bin/gtir.mjs eval --edges --repo eval/corpus --golden eval/edges-golden.json --baseline eval/edges-baseline.json
scripts.eval:disambig: node bin/gtir.mjs eval --disambig --repo eval/corpus --golden eval/disambig-golden.json --baseline eval/disambig-baseline.json
scripts.eval:orphans: node bin/gtir.mjs eval --orphans --repo eval/orphans-corpus --golden eval/orphans-golden.json --baseline eval/orphans-baseline.json
